name: 10 Days That Unexpectedly Changed America
overview: 10 Days That Unexpectedly Changed America is a ten-hour, ten-part television miniseries that aired on the History Channel from April 9 through April 14, 2006. The material was later adapted and published as a book by the same title.

trailers.title: 10 Days that unexpectedly Changed America Trailer - Antietam
